extortion.description: [AI generated] A Plus Machining is a US-based company that specializes in precision CNC (Computer Numerical Control) machining. They handle an assortment of metals and plastics, providing services such as milling, turning, surface grinding, and wire EDM. Known for their high-quality services, they serve industries like aerospace, automotive, medical, and more. Their customer-focused approach ensures end products meet specific needs.
